headline: Researchers Develop AI That Can Predict When You'll Get Sick By Analyzing Your Calendar
summary: The AI correctly predicted illness 94% of the time by noting that 'meetings with this person always cause colds.'
fullBody: Scientists have developed an AI system that can predict when you'll get sick by analyzing your calendar and identifying patterns like 'any day with more than 3 meetings = guaranteed illness.' The AI, named CalendarSick, works by cross-referencing your schedule with your health data and identifying correlations between specific people, places, and stress levels. The AI's most accurate prediction came from noting that 'whenever you have a meeting with that guy from accounting, you get sick within 48 hours, so maybe don't do that.' The system has a 94% accuracy rate and has started recommending 'sick days you didn't know you needed' to users proactively. One user said, 'The AI told me I was going to get sick on Thursday before I even had symptoms. I called in sick, and it was right. I now trust an algorithm more than my own body's warnings.'
